rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the net return calculation).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (incorrect conclusion about net returns).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
